Residential Stucco in Lee County, TX

Lee County offers a quieter pace of life with rolling farmland, wooded creek bottoms, and small-town charm centered on Giddings and Lexington. Star Stucco of Austin provides residential stucco installations for homeowners across the county who want a durable, low-maintenance exterior that holds up on exposed rural properties.

Get a Free EstimateCall (512) 706-9699

Dependable Stucco for Lee County Properties

Lee County sits east of the Austin metro at the transition between the Blackland Prairie and the Post Oak Belt. The landscape is defined by gently rolling pastures, stands of post oak, and fertile bottomland along the Middle Yegua Creek and other waterways. Homes here range from established farmsteads and ranches to newer homes on acreage outside Giddings.

The county's sandy loam and clay mix creates soil conditions that are less extreme than the heavy clays closer to Austin, but still require attention during stucco installation. Wind exposure on open properties and intense summer heat mean that finish materials must resist UV degradation and thermal cycling.

Our crews travel to Lee County prepared to work on rural sites with the same quality and attention we bring to urban projects closer to Austin. We understand the logistics of rural job sites and arrive with everything needed to work efficiently.

What's Included With Our Residential Stucco in Lee County

Every project includes expert craftsmanship, quality materials, and a commitment to lasting results.

Property & Exterior Review

We assess your home's walls, exposure, foundation, and existing finishes to determine the optimal stucco system for your Lee County property.

Surface Prep & Moisture Protection

Surfaces are cleaned, old materials removed, and a weather-resistive barrier is installed to safeguard the wall assembly against rain and humidity.

Lath & Scratch Coat

Metal lath is installed to specification, and the scratch coat is applied, keyed, and given adequate cure time for a strong bond.

Brown Coat

The brown coat is applied and floated to a uniform surface, creating a solid base for the finish texture.

Finish Texture & Color

We apply the final coat in your chosen texture and color. Integral pigments or acrylic topcoats deliver a consistent, fade-resistant finish.

Final Walkthrough & Warranty

We walk the completed project with you, ensure every detail is right, clean the site, and provide written warranty documents.

Common Residential Stucco Needs in Lee County

Lee County homeowners choose stucco for its durability on rural properties and its clean, lasting appearance.

New Home Stucco

Whether you are building on family land or a new lot outside Giddings, we install complete stucco systems on new residential construction.

Farmstead & Ranch Home Exteriors

Stucco provides a hard-wearing, pest-resistant finish for ranch homes and agricultural properties that face constant sun and wind exposure.

Updating Older Homes

Giddings and Lexington have homes with aging siding or deteriorating exteriors. A full stucco application modernizes the look and adds weather protection.

Matching Additions & Outbuildings

When you add to your home or build a detached workshop, we match the new stucco to the existing finish for a cohesive property appearance.

Low-Maintenance Exterior Choice

Rural homeowners appreciate stucco because it requires minimal upkeep — no painting, no wood rot, no pest damage — freeing them to focus on other aspects of property management.

Why Choose Us for Residential Stucco in Lee County?

  • Equipped to work efficiently on rural Lee County properties and remote sites
  • Materials chosen for open-field wind exposure and intense Central Texas UV
  • Honest, no-pressure inspections with clear explanations of findings
  • Self-sufficient crews who bring all equipment and supplies to the job site
  • Durable finishes that maintain their appearance with minimal upkeep
  • Free estimates for homeowners throughout Lee County

Licensed & Insured

Full liability coverage and workers' compensation for every project in Lee County.

20+ Years Experience

Decades of hands-on stucco work across Central Texas residential and commercial properties.

Certified Applicators

Certified by Sto Corp, Senergy/BASF, Master Wall, Dryvit, and Parex LaHabra for the highest quality results.

Our Residential Stucco Process

A straightforward approach from start to finish — no surprises, no shortcuts.

1

Request Your Free Estimate

Call (512) 706-9699 or submit a request online. We serve all of Lee County and will schedule a convenient visit to your property.

2

On-Site Review

We inspect your home's exterior, evaluate site conditions, and discuss your goals for the stucco project.

3

Receive Your Proposal

A clear, written estimate details materials, scope, timeline, and pricing. We answer every question before work begins.

4

Professional Stucco Work

Our crew completes the installation from base to finish, maintains a clean site, and presents the final result for your approval.
